base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of register_name_letter_grid — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. Letter-grid for name-entry — A-Z + 0-9 + space + back/end in 6-column grid. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Letter-grid for name-entry — A-Z + 0-9 + space + back/end in 6-column grid; cursor navigates with D-pad
